description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style assault rifle with a distinctive skeletonized carrying handle and integrated iron sights. The body features a dark, matte finish with custom urban-themed graphics, including yellow and white text and stylized illustrations. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly curved and positioned behind the trigger group, characteristic of bullpup designs. The rifle has a fixed stock integrated into the main body, and the barrel is standard length with a visible flash hider at the muzzle. The grip is ergonomic, and the trigger guard is large, allowing for gloved use. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal and polymer materials.
description: A bullpup assault rifle with urban-themed graphics, skeletonized carry handle, and a detachable box magazine. It features a matte finish, ergonomic grip, and a standard barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, urban graphics, skeletonized carry handle, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, magazine, and the alignment of the barrel with the main body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rifle's graphics, magazine, and the details of the grip and trigger area.
